description: PHP script that directly calls Utils::readLine() from guzzlehttp/psr7 2.1.0, triggering CVE-2022-24775 header injection vulnerability.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: index.php directly calls Utils::readLine() with user-supplied stdin stream

findings.human_justification: Utils::readLine() is called directly in index.php with untrusted stdin input, making the header injection vulnerability exploitable.
